headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
headers.Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=()
